clusters.title: IMPLEMENT: Add .smartdocignore parser and enforce in polaris docs ingest
clusters.rationale: New module + additive check in ingestDocs(). No existing behavior changed, only blocked when endpoint artifact detected.
key_functions: ingestDocs() — add isIngestIneligible check before processing each file
acceptance_criteria: .smartdocignore parsed with gitignore-style patterns
Default endpoint artifact patterns enforced without file
docs-ingest-skipped-endpoint-artifact telemetry event emitted
ingestDocs() rejects endpoint artifacts with clear error
Tests: ignored rejected, non-ignored passes, custom pattern, default without file

clusters.title: IMPLEMENT: Add endpoint artifact protection to polaris docs migrate
clusters.rationale: Purely additive — extends ALLOWED_BASENAMES and ALLOWED_DIR_PREFIXES. Files that were being migrated will now be excluded, preventing them from entering the ingest queue.
key_functions: isAllowedException() — extend with AGENTS.md, CLAUDE.md, GEMINI.md, Polaris-Docs/
migrateDocs() — call isIngestIneligible() via smartdoc-ignore module
acceptance_criteria: AGENTS.md, CLAUDE.md, GEMINI.md excluded from migrate queue by default
Polaris-Docs/ not re-migrated
.smartdocignore patterns respected by migrate
endpointArtifactReason field in MigrateFileResult
Tests cover all new exclusions

clusters.title: IMPLEMENT: Add candidate promotion governance with audit logging
clusters.rationale: Changes doctrinePromote() contract — adds required front matter fields. Breaking change for existing candidates without governance metadata. --skip-governance escape hatch mitigates migration risk.
key_functions: doctrinePromote() — require governance front matter fields
addCandidateGovernanceMetadata() — new helper, called from ingestDocs()
acceptance_criteria: doctrinePromote() rejects files without governance front matter
Promotion blocked unless recommended-action: promote
audit.jsonl written for every promotion
ingestDocs() sets placeholder governance front matter on doctrine-candidate
--skip-governance flag exists and logs governance-override warning
Tests cover all governance enforcement paths

clusters.title: IMPLEMENT: Add polaris docs audit subcommand for recursive ingest risk report
clusters.rationale: Read-only subcommand. No existing behavior changed. New module + CLI registration only.
key_functions: polaris docs audit — CLI subcommand with --json and --output flags
acceptance_criteria: polaris docs audit is a working CLI subcommand
Identifies all recursive ingest risk paths
Reports pipeline stages, current/missing protections
--json output is machine-readable AuditResult
--output writes markdown findings report
Tests cover all risk detection paths

notes: POL-131 must run before POL-132 and POL-134 (smartdoc-ignore module dependency). POL-133 is independent and can run in parallel with POL-131. POL-132 and POL-134 require POL-131 complete.
